description: White rounded-square icon badge (mirrored accent shape, radius 20px 4px 20px 4px) holding a Brand Blue line icon (~48px inside), with a drop shadow 0 4px 10px rgba(1,30,69,0.18). Straddles the left edge of the icon callout box, center on the edge. May be pre-composited as a transparent PNG for Outlook fidelity.
